title: Titanors Chimes and Additions
description: A Bunch of Bells, Chimes and Other Additions
body:
**This mod may be merged into another mod i am working on in the future**

**Titanors Chimes and Additions** is a Minecraft mod that enhances your game with a variety of decorative bells, chimes, and other unique additions. Perfect for players who love to customize their worlds with auditory and visual appeal, this mod introduces charming sounds and beautiful new blocks to your Minecraft experience.

### Current Features in V1

- **Call Bell**: A classic, attention-grabbing bell for summoning friends or adding a touch of elegance to your builds.
- **Small Gong**: A compact gong that produces a resonant tone, perfect for creating a serene atmosphere.
- **Hand Bell**: A portable bell for on-the-go ringing, ideal for ceremonies or just having fun.
- **Amethyst Bricks**: Stunning purple bricks made from amethyst, adding a touch of magic to your constructions.
- **Chest Fences**: Wooden fences with built-in chests, available in every wood type (except bamboo), combining functionality with aesthetics.

### WIP / Upcoming Features

- **Christmas Bells**: Festive bells to ring in the holiday spirit.
- **Party Blowers**: Fun and colorful blowers for celebrations and parties.
- **Referee Whistle**: A sharp whistle sound for all your sporting events and competitions.
- **Large Gong**: A grand, resonant gong that makes a statement in any setting.
- **Clown Horn**: A whimsical horn that adds a touch of humor to your world.
- **Cow Bell**: A rustic bell for bringing a bit of the countryside into your game.

Enhance your Minecraft world with the delightful sounds and unique additions from Titanors Chimes and Additions. Download now and start ringing in the fun!
